title: hieracium gymnocephalum subsp. gymnocephalum
intro: Hieracium gymnocephalum subsp. gymnocephalum is a plant species commonly known as the woolly hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium gymnocephalum subsp. gymnocephalum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
